business.type_label: portable toilet / construction-site cabin & fence rental company

engine.ladder_reasoning: Visitor is evaluating a defined rental product line (WC models with specs, use-cases, prices) backed by a features/use-case argument, not trusting a named expert nor browsing a portfolio; the store-redirect-style quote button sits atop a full product argument, so it is thing not quick-yes.

goal.one_action: request a price quote for WC rental (via calculator lead form or contact form), or call to rent

structure.archetype_note: Static multi-page Bootstrap site; product lineup + interactive quote calculator + contact/quote forms; two regional sub-brands (PasiKuikka Oy / Pispis) on one domain.

mapped.observed_as: WC-VUOKRAUS HELSINKI, ESPOO... / Tampere ja Pirkanmaa (served-area SEO blocks)
PYYDÄ TARJOUS quote form (Nimi, Toimitusosoite, Sähköposti...)
TUTUSTU PASIKUIKAN TARINAAN (founder Tomi Kuikka story)
YHTEYSTIEDOT company legal info + regional contacts

unmapped.observed: TARJOUSLASKURI — live JS pricing calculator (months/qty/model → computed total) feeding the lead form
unmapped.why_no_fit: canonical sections have no id for an interactive computational quote tool; 'pricing' captures the price display but not the compute-user-input behaviour

proposed_new.name: interactive-calculators
proposed_new.evidence: laskuri.html is a real JS-driven quote calculator: months/quantity selectors + model dropdowns compute a live total (e.g. 373€ + alv, 218€ + alv) before the lead form

confidence.why: fetch_quality=rendered (not full); Tally contact-form fields are inside an iframe and not enumerable, and dropdown/calculator internals only partially observable

gap_findings: No taxonomy slot for an interactive price/quote calculator that computes user-specific totals then hands off to a lead form (matches proposed interactive-calculators).
Single domain hosts two regional sub-brands (PasiKuikka Oy / Pispis) with separate phones/emails — no capability expresses a multi-brand-per-site split.
A product-catalog rental line with per-model packages+prices whose goal is a quote (not checkout) sits awkwardly between catalog/packages and lead-form.
